rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Further Deposition And Declaration Of Sam Ware In Support Thereof And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Denied. The Court cannot order production of a file the responding party has diligently looked for but cannot find. Except as to the estate planning file, the other files fall outside the scope of discovery previously delineated in this limited proceeding. In any event, the categories as requested in the subpoena are overbroad. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3720) by 5:00 p.m. on 1/11/12.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories Set No. Two
rulings.Rulings: Denied. The Court is not satisfied that the moving party adequately met and conferred. In any event, the responses moving party has now received are adequate. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3720) by 5:00 p.m. on 1/11/12.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Case Management
